raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Tad nottike ta KUNGA
Wahrds uhs manni/ un fattija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Ne warru es jums ta dar-
riht/ ka schis Pohdneeks/ aktu
Israëta Nams! fakka tas
KUNGS: Raugi/ ka Mahli
Pohdneeka Rohkâ/ ta eftat juhs
mannâ Rohkâ/ tu Israëta
Nams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Azzumirkti runnaju es
pahr weenu Tautu/ un pahr
weenu Walstibu/ ka es to grib-
bu isdeldeht/ un pohstiht/ un
nomaitaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Bet ja schi Tauta atgree-
schahs no fawa Launuma/ pahr
ko es scho efimu runnajs/ tad ir
man buhs tas Launuims schehl/
fo es winnai gribbeju darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Azzumirkti runnaju es ar-
ridsan pahr weenu Tautu/ un
pahr weenu Walstibu/ ka es to
gribbu uhstaifcht/ un dehstiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Bet ja ta preeksch man-
nahm Azzim tauna darra/ un
mannai Balsi ne klaufa/ tad ir
man buhs schehl tas Labbuims /
ar fo es biju Johlijs winnai lab-
ba darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un nu runna jelle uhs
teem Wihreem no Juhda/ un us
teem Jerusalemes Eedshwota-
jeem/ un fakki: Ta fakka tas
KUNGS: Raugi/ es padarru
pahr jums weenu Launuunu/ un
dohmaju prett jums Dohmas.
Atgreeseetees jelle ifkatrs no fa-
wa tauna Zelta/ un darrajt
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Bet tee fakka: Tas irr
weltri/ jo mehs gribbam pehz
muhsahn Dohmatchannahn stat-
gaht/ un darritim ifkatrs pehz
fawas niknas Sirde Prahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Tadeht ta fakka tas
KUNGS: Watzajt jelle starp
teem Paganeem/ kas irr tahdas
Leetas dsirdejs/ ka schahs irraid?
Ta Israëta Jumprawa darra
weenu tohti negantu Leetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Arrig tas Sneegs no Lib-
banus atstahjahs ( tik drihs )
no weena Afrika us Lauku?
Arrig tas fwech anksts tekkohrs
Uhdens ( tik drihs ) aisskreem/
ka manni Laudis mannis ais-
mirst?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Tee kwehpina tai Nelee-
tibai/ jo tee irr tohs apgrehzi-
najtchi us faweem Zelfeem/ us
tahin wezzahm Tekkahm/ ka teem
bij staigaht us weenu nestaiga-
tu Zeltu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Ka winnu Semme poh-
stâ tohp par Apsimeekli muh-
scham/ wijs/ kas tur fezzen eet/
brihnifees/ un frattihg sawn
Galivu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Ka tas Rihta Wehisch/
ta iskaifischu es tohs Eenaidnee-
fu Preekfcha/ es rahditchu teem
to Pakaufu / un ne to Watgu/
winnu Bohjâ-Eefchanas Deenâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Tad fattija tee: Nahzeet/
tadohinatin prett Jeremiju Pa-
dohinn/ jo ta Baustiba ne warr
just no teem Preestereem/ nedS
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
